content.query:
use nyc_taxi_discovery;

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/nyc-taxi-data/raw/trip_data_green_delta/',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS [result];   --we get 2 additional columns as year and month which we dont get using parquet files


SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_delta/year=2020',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS [result];   --get the error as Content of directory on path 'https://datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/nyc-taxi-data/raw/trip_data_green_delta/year=2020/_delta_log/*.*' cannot be listed.

exec sp_describe_first_result_set N'
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK ''https://datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/nyc-taxi-data/raw/trip_data_green_delta/'',
        FORMAT = ''DELTA''
    ) AS [result]';

exec sp_describe_first_result_set N'
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK ''https://datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/nyc-taxi-data/raw/trip_data_green_delta/'',
        FORMAT = ''DELTA''
    ) with (
                VendorID INT,
                lpep_pickup_datetime datetime2(7),
                lpep_dropoff_datetime datetime2(7),
                store_and_fwd_flag CHAR(1),
                RatecodeID INT,
                PULocationID INT,
                DOLocationID INT,
                passenger_count INT,
                trip_distance FLOAT,
                fare_amount FLOAT,
                extra FLOAT,
                mta_tax FLOAT,
                tip_amount FLOAT,
                tolls_amount FLOAT,
                ehail_fee INT,
                improvement_surcharge FLOAT,
                total_amount FLOAT,
                payment_type INT,
                trip_type INT,
                congestion_surcharge FLOAT,
                year varchar(4),
                month varchar(2)
    ) AS [result]';

SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/nyc-taxi-data/raw/trip_data_green_delta/',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) with (
                tip_amount FLOAT,
                trip_type INT
    ) AS [result];

SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/nyc-taxi-data/raw/trip_data_green_delta/',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) with (
                tip_amount FLOAT,
                trip_type INT,
                year VARCHAR(4),
                month VARCHAR(2)
    ) AS [result];
